## Type

## Checks

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run seed:example`

## Safety

- [ ] No real API keys, tokens, passwords, or service-role keys.
- [ ] No private student/user documents or personal data.
- [ ] New behavior keeps retrieved documents as data, not trusted instructions.
